log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+6=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration: FAIL! 39 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:13+6=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration: SUCCESS. 16 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 12/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (12/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.

REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
